title: WikiTopicKindSchema
description: Structured payload for topic-kind wiki pages — agents read this for retrieval; humans read content_md.

summary.description: TL;DR — what the team should remember about this topic. <500 chars.

key_systems.description: wiki-redesign-gap-fill / Group 6 — non-people entities (system, service, product, tool) that drive this topic, with channel-context definitions.

cross_references.description: Related Topic / People / Glossary page titles emitted as [[Title]] wikilinks for the cross-reference resolver.

parent_context.description: Sub-topic only — short paragraph anchoring this page to its parent topic (with [[Parent Title]] wikilink). Empty for top-level topics.

subtopic_scope.description: Sub-topic only — explicit statement of what this sub-topic covers vs. siblings. Empty for top-level topics.
